contents: (** Geometrically, a nullhomotopy of a map [f : X -> Y] is an extension of [f] to a map [Cone X -> Y].  One might more simply call it e.g. [Constant f], but that is a little ambiguous: it could also reasonably mean e.g. a factorisation of [f] through [ Trunc -1 X ].  (Should the unique map [0 -> Y] be constant in one way, or in [Y]-many ways?) *)

Definition NullHomotopy {X Y : Type} (f : X -> Y)
    := {y : Y & forall x:X, f x = y}.

goals.conclusion: forall a : Y, IsTrunc n (forall x : X, f x = a)
IsTrunc n (forall x : X, f x = y)
forall a : X, IsTrunc n (f a = y)

contents:
Definition nullhomotopy_homotopic {X Y : Type} {f g : X -> Y} (p : f == g)
    : NullHomotopy f -> NullHomotopy g.

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: forall x : X, g x = y

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y

contents: intros x; exact ((p x)^ @ e x).

Definition nullhomotopy_composeR {X Y Z : Type} (f : X -> Y) (g : Y -> Z)
    : NullHomotopy g -> NullHomotopy (g o f).

hypotheses.type: forall x : Y, g x = z

goals.conclusion: forall x : X, g (f x) = z

hypotheses.type: forall x : Y, g x = z

contents:
Definition nullhomotopy_composeL {X Y Z : Type} (f : X -> Y) (g : Y -> Z)
    : NullHomotopy f -> NullHomotopy (g o f).

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: forall x : X, g (f x) = g y

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y
forall x : X, g (f x) = z

goals.conclusion: forall x : X, f x = g^-1 z

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, g (f x) = z
forall x : X, g (f x) = z

goals.conclusion: forall x : Y, g x = z

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, g (f x) = z
forall x : X, g (f x) = z
forall x : X, g (f x) = z
forall x : X, g (f x) = z
forall x : X, g (f x) = z

contents:
Definition nullhomotopy_ap {X Y : Type} (f : X -> Y) (x1 x2 : X)
    : NullHomotopy f -> NullHomotopy (@ap _ _ f x1 x2).

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y
forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: forall x : x1 = x2, ap f x = ?y

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y
forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: forall x : x1 = x2, ap f x = e x1 @ (e x2)^

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: ap f p = e x1 @ (e x2)^

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: ap f p @ e x2 = e x1

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y

goals.conclusion: e x1 @ ap (fun _ : X => y) p = e x1

hypotheses.type: forall x : X, f x = y
forall x : X, f x = y
